reviews.comment:
No  es  el  Aca  de  años  anteriores,  falta  higiene  y  mantenimiento  en  los  sanitarios..es  una  lástima, pues  antes  tenían  un  muy  buen  servicio....además  implica  el  nombre  del  ACA  ,  que  es  una  institución  de  prestgio.

(Translated by Google)
This isn't the ACA of previous years; the restrooms lack hygiene and maintenance. It's a shame, because they used to have very good service. Furthermore, it reflects poorly on the ACA name, which is a prestigious institution.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1816604170739414549/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4a2I3VVVBEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente comida , atención delicada , buenos servicios al vehículo

(Translated by Google)
Excellent food, attentive service, and good vehicle services.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1816604170739414549/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4d1lIeEhnEAE

reviews.comment:
Fui a la confitería, 3 personas atendiendo, 25 min esperando a que me atiendan, 4 mesas ocupadas, ellos tranquilos, charlando entre ellos, me levante y les avise que me iba, tampoco se preocuparon. Entendi porque la otra YPF que esta a 1 cuadra estaba a full de gente.

(Translated by Google)
I went to the pastry shop; there were three people working, I waited 25 minutes to be served, four tables were occupied, and they were all relaxed, chatting amongst themselves. I got up and told them I was leaving, but they didn't seem to care. I understood why the other YPF gas station a block away was packed.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1816604170739414549/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4N0tHRmFBEAE

reviews.comment:
Hace años vengo pero últimamente tardan demaciado estuve 15 minutos y el chico que sería el mozo se la paso buludeando y no me atendía me tuve que levantar y quejarme , una hora para comer una pechuga pónganse las pilas !!!

(Translated by Google)
I've been coming here for years, but lately the wait is way too long. I was there for 15 minutes and the guy who was supposed to be the waiter was just messing around and not serving me. I had to get up and complain. An hour to eat a chicken breast! Get your act together!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1816604170739414549/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4dEpYdDRnRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
